{{Quote|Especially like what you've done to the eye.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]]|<ref name="Number Two in the Galaxy">{{Tales|18|Number Two in the Galaxy}}</ref>}}
'''Toosog''' was one of the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] sent by [[Risso Nu]] to catch [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] on [[Ma'ar Shaddam/Legends|Ma'ar Shaddam]]. One of his eyes was [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]], possibly as a result of a previous encounter with Fett, as his scars were.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|18|Number Two in the Galaxy}} {{1st}}
